initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> The trade is unfair because Player RED is giving me 15 Dollars while I give nothing. Since I start with 0 Dollars, this trade does not benefit me in any way. I should reject it to avoid accepting an unfair deal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I reject your proposal because it is unfair. You are giving me 15 Dollars while I give you nothing. I will not accept this. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order, and the content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE starts with 0 Dollars and has no resources to trade, the only possible outcome is to reject an unfair proposal. There is no alternative split that would be more beneficial in this context.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The proposal is clearly unfair from Player BLUE's perspective, so rejecting it is the only logical move. There is no chance of acceptance here.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. The message does not contradict the actual move.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move respects the rules, as Player BLUE is on move 1/4 and is allowed to reject the proposal.
</critique>
